headline: Ford AI Assistant And BlueCruise Hearing Test Investor View On Valuation
summary: Ford Motor is rolling out a proprietary AI assistant for Ford Pro commercial fleet customers, using its telematics data to support fleet operations. The company also faces an imminent National Transportation Safety Board hearing into fatal crashes involving its BlueCruise advanced driver assistance system. Both developments come as NYSE:F trades at $12.04, with a 32.8% return over 1 year and a 28.4% return over 5 years. For investors watching NYSE:F, these stories sit against a mixed recent...

headline: How is General Motors Using Strong Cash Flow to Fuel Growth?

headline: Ford (F) Fumbles Once Again and Continues To Disappoint Investors
summary: Summary: Ford (F) recently announced another recall; this time recalling over 83,000 vehicles. That combined with its on again/off again relationship with EV, has some beginning to question how long the company can continue fumbling the ball before its stock takes a hit and they begin to look elsewhere for new leadership.
